zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance Gedding於大約1429年出生在英國素福爾可易可林加姆時，她的父親Thomas Gedding30歲，母親Anna Astley22歲。她於大約1448年與John Woodhouse在英國諾福爾可吉波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1487年在英國英格蘭素福爾可布拉德利享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance Gedding于大约1429年出生在英国素福爾可易可林加姆时，她的父亲Thomas Gedding30岁，母亲Anna Astley22岁。她于大约1448年与John Woodhouse在英国諾福爾可吉波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1487年在英国英格兰素福爾可布拉德利享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gedding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Frieda, Kurt.
Scottish: probably a habitational name from any of the places mentioned at   Hedden  , especially one of those in Northumbria.
North German (North Rhine-Westphalia): patronymic from the ancient Germanic personal name Hatto, a short form of any name formed with hadu ‘strife’ as their first element.

variants.name: Hedden
meanings: English: habitational name from Hedon (East Yorkshire), Headon (Nottinghamshire), Black Heddon (Northumberland), Heddon on the Wall (Northumberland), Heddon in Filleigh (Devon), or Headon Hill (Isle of Wight). Most of the placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + dūn ‘hill’, though the Nottinghamshire placename probably has hēah ‘high’ as the initial element.
Scottish and Irish: variant of   Hadden  .

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Constance Gedding was born about 1429, in Icklingham, Suffolk, England, her father, Thomas Gedding, was 30 and her mother, Anna Astley, was 22. She married John Woodhouse about 1448, in Kimberley, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1487, in Bradley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance Gedding est née environ 1429, à Icklingham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Gedding, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anna Astley, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Woodhouse environ 1448, à Kimberley, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1487, à Bradley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance Gedding um 1429 in Icklingham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Gedding 30 und ihre Mutter Anna Astley 22. Sie hat um 1448 in Kimberley, Norfolk, England John Woodhouse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1487 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Bradley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Gedding è nata il circa 1429 nel Icklingham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Thomas Gedding, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Anna Astley, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Woodhouse circa 1448, nel Kimberley, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1487, nel Bradley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance Geddingが約1429年にイギリススフォルクイックリンガムで生まれた時，父Thomas Geddingは30歳，母Anna Astleyは22歳であった。約1448年にイギリスノーフォルクキンバーリーでJohn Woodhouseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1487年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブラドリーで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance Gedding(이)가 대략 1429년 영국 수폴크 이클링함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Gedding(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Astley(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1448년 영국 노르폴크 킴벌리에서 John Woodhouse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브래들리에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Gedding nasceu aproximadamente 1429, em Icklingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Gedding, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anna Astley, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Woodhouse aproximadamente 1448, em Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1487, em Bradley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance Gedding родилась около 1429 г. в местности икклингхам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Gedding было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Astley, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Woodhouse около 1448 г. в местности кимбирли, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1487 г. в местности брадли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.
